task: Migrate download queue screens from FlexibleAdapter/RecyclerView to Jetpack Compose, then remove the flexibleadapter dependency

features.name: Refactor screen models to emit Compose-compatible state

learnings: ISEXPANDED_BUG: FIXED in Feature 2 — _collapsedSources tracks collapsed source IDs (empty=all expanded). Apply same pattern to MangaDownloadQueueScreenModel.
MISSING_DISTINCTUNTILCHANGED: FIXED in Feature 2 for anime. Apply same fix to MangaDownloadQueueScreenModel.

DEAD_CODE_FOR_FEATURE4: Both ScreenModels still have adapter, controllerBinding, progressJobs, listener object, getHolder(), onUpdateProgress(), onUpdateDownloadedPages(), onStatusChange(), cancelProgressJob(). These reference old FlexibleAdapter types and MUST be removed in Feature 4.

COMPOSE_MENU_METHODS: Feature 2 added moveToTop/Bottom/Series and cancelDownload/Series to AnimeDownloadQueueScreenModel. Feature 3 must add identical methods to MangaDownloadQueueScreenModel using MangaDownloadUiItem/MangaDownload.
REUSE_COMPOSABLES: Plan says extract shared DownloadQueueItem/DownloadQueueHeader composables. Feature 3 should reuse the Anime composable structure — either extract to shared file or mirror exactly.
